name: @stackra/network
purpose: Network detection — online/offline plus connection-type/speed, browser/native/node detectors, event emission, and React bindings.
capabilities: Connection type + speed via Network Information API
Browser, React Native, and Node detector implementations
when_to_use: Reacting to online/offline transitions or gating requests on connection quality.
when_not_to_use: For pause/resume of queued requests use @stackra/query with network hints; for offline sync use @stackra/sync.
